articles.title: Red Sox win fifth straight, top White Sox 5-0
articles.description:
Boston has won 10 of 12 and and 13 of its last 18.

The post Red Sox win fifth straight, top White Sox 5-0 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox defeated White Sox 5-0 on July 8, marking their fifth consecutive win.
Boston has won 10 of their last 12 games, boosting playoff hopes.
Residents can expect increased excitement and support for the team as they continue winning.

articles.title: Club Café founder and vice president dies, the venue says
articles.description:
Frank A. Ribaudo helped build the Back Bay venue into a hub for Boston's LGBTQ+ community and HIV/AIDS advocacy.

The post Club Café founder and vice president dies, the venue says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Frank A. Ribaudo, founder of Club Café, passed away, impacting Boston's LGBTQ+ community.
Ribaudo played a key role in HIV/AIDS advocacy at the Back Bay venue since its inception.
His death leaves a significant void in local LGBTQ+ leadership and community support.

articles.title: Boston man charged with snatching older women’s purses while riding by them on moped
articles.description:
In some of the robberies, prosecutors allege the victims fell to the ground and suffered injuries.

The post Boston man charged with snatching older women’s purses while riding by them on moped appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston man charged with multiple purse snatchings from older women using a moped.
Victims reported injuries after being knocked down during the thefts.
Increased concern for safety among Boston's senior community following these incidents.

articles.title: Norwell issues town-wide boil water order after E. coli detected in water supply
articles.description:
Norwell residents should boil all tap water used for drinking, cooking, brushing teeth, food preparation, and washing dishes until further notice from the town, officials wrote.

The post Norwell issues town-wide boil water order after E. coli detected in water supply appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Norwell issues boil water order due to E. coli contamination detected in water supply.
Residents must boil tap water for drinking and cooking until further notice.
Health officials emphasize the importance of boiling water to prevent illness.

articles.title: Willson Contreras to become 1st Red Sox participant in Home Run Derby since 2011
articles.description:
"I’m a little bit nervous, I won’t lie. But I think it’s going to be fun.”

The post Willson Contreras to become 1st Red Sox participant in Home Run Derby since 2011 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Willson Contreras will represent the Red Sox in the Home Run Derby on July 8, 2026.
He is the first Red Sox player to participate since 2011.
Contreras' participation may boost local fan engagement and excitement for the team.

articles.title: Democrat Graham Platner says he plans to withdraw from Maine Senate race after sexual assault claim
articles.description:
Platner’s exit will most likely force a reckoning within the party, which has been divided between its moderate and progressive factions, when it is struggling to unify during this year’s midterm elections.

The post Democrat Graham Platner says he plans to withdraw from Maine Senate race after sexual assault claim appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Graham Platner plans to withdraw from the Maine Senate race amid sexual assault allegations.
His exit may deepen divisions within the Democratic Party ahead of the midterm elections.
Boston residents could see shifts in local Democratic strategies and candidate selections.

articles.title: Elias Lindholm remains an uncomfortable question mark for retooling Bruins
articles.description:
"It just might be this is what his new level is, and you have to accept that."

The post Elias Lindholm remains an uncomfortable question mark for retooling Bruins appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Elias Lindholm's performance raises concerns for the Bruins' retooling strategy.
Lindholm's contract status remains uncertain as of July 8, 2026.
His potential decline could affect the Bruins' competitiveness in the NHL.

articles.title: Boston Councilor Julia Mejia suffers medical emergency during City Council meeting
articles.description:
Mayor Wu says the Councilor Mejia is "doing well."

The post Boston Councilor Julia Mejia suffers medical emergency during City Council meeting appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Councilor Julia Mejia experienced a medical emergency during a City Council meeting.
Mayor Michelle Wu confirmed Mejia is recovering and in stable condition.
The incident raises concerns about health protocols during public meetings in Boston.

articles.title: My truck’s air conditioner only works when set to full blast
articles.description:
John Paul, AAA Northeast's Car Doctor, hears from a reader whose truck’s AC only works with the blower on high.

The post My truck’s air conditioner only works when set to full blast appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: John Paul, AAA Northeast's Car Doctor, addresses a truck AC issue affecting local drivers.
The AC only functions on high, indicating potential mechanical problems for Boston residents.
Residents may face discomfort during summer months if their vehicle's AC system is malfunctioning.
